titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Riding Steep Paths
Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding Riding Steep Paths

segments: : «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ مَرْثَدُ بْنُ أَبِي مَرْثَدٍ اَلْغَنَوِيُّ يُعْقِبُونَ بَعِيراً بَيْنَهُمْ وَ هُمْ مُنْطَلِقُونَ إِلَى بَدْرٍ ».
arabic.text: : «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ وَ مَرْثَدُ بْنُ أَبِي مَرْثَدٍ اَلْغَنَوِيُّ يُعْقِبُونَ بَعِيراً بَيْنَهُمْ وَ هُمْ مُنْطَلِقُونَ إِلَى بَدْرٍ ».

segments:
Hadith.2496 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Abu Basir, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
"The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family), Amir al-Mu'minin (as), and Marthad ibn Abi Marthad al-Ghanawi would take turns riding a camel among them as they headed toward Badr."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.2496 - Ali ibn Ri'ab narrated from Abu Basir, from Abu Ja'far (as), who said:
"The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace and blessings of Allah (swt) be upon him and his family), Amir al-Mu'minin (as), and Marthad ibn Abi Marthad al-Ghanawi would take turns riding a camel among them as they headed toward Badr."

narratorChain.raw: 2496 - رَوَى عَلِيُّ بْنُ رِئَابٍ عَنْ أَبِي بَصِيرٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
